description_long: This is a full-size, rectangular computer keyboard with a matte black finish and a standard key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right. The keys are slightly raised and uniformly spaced, with white alphanumeric and function labels clearly visible on each keycap. The keyboard's surface appears smooth and hard, with a low-profile design that sits flat on a surface. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the top surface. The overall construction suggests a plastic exterior with internal electronic components and air gaps beneath the keys. The keyboard is in excellent, new condition with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A matte black, full-size computer keyboard with white-labeled keys and a numeric keypad, in new condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rows of keys receding into the distance, with the spacebar and bottom row most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the keyboard, highlighting the numeric keypad and the uniform key arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with the top row of function keys and the back edge of the keyboard most visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length and the arrangement of keys, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
